name: Technical Blueprint
description: Blueprint/schematic style with a technical feel. Perfect for architecture diagrams, API flows, and system documentation visuals.
style_prompt: Technical blueprint style, dark blue background, white and light blue lines, schematic diagram aesthetic, grid pattern, clean connecting lines with arrows, node-based layout, engineering drawing feel
color_guidance: dark navy background, white lines and text, cyan light blue for highlights, subtle grid pattern, clean technical aesthetic
avoid: photorealism, organic shapes, warm colors, hand-drawn elements
